narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-FIN-11 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2024-54529. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1476, T1078, T1190, T1542, T1068. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-IR-02 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1036, T1027, T1078, T1190, T1204. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CYB-01 has been observed in 5 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1555, T1190, T1078, T1059, T1547. Average risk score: 9.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 6 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-66376. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1059.001, T1476, T1593, T1566.002, T1078. Average risk score: 9.4/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-12 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1036, T1555, T1078, T1190, T1566.002. Average risk score: 9.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 40 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-3888. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1003.001, T1204.002, T1593, T1078.001, T1566.002. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 8.7/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 8 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1530, T1204.002, T1555, T1078, T1190. Average risk score: 8.4/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.
Threat actor CDB-CN-01 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1071, T1078, T1190, T1059, T1547. Average risk score: 6.7/10.

Threat actor UNC-UNKNOWN has been observed in 171 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-4862, CVE-2026-27602, CVE-2026-3857, CVE-2026-28864, CVE-2026-33201. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1204.002, T1003.001, T1566.002, T1110, T1059. CRITICAL: 29 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 5.7/10.

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange
Replace with ML-KEM or hybrid key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE - quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto - quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
